text: During a left-sided laparoscopic nephrectomy, the surgeon encounters a malfunctioning hemoloclip applicator while attempting to clamp the renal vein. Silk thread is used to tie the pedicle, with multiple surgical knots applied. Titanium clips are placed above and below the knot to secure the vein and prevent retrograde blood flow. The renal vein is then cut, revealing one knot and two clips securing the vessel.
